sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32352" key="e)klepuro/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκλεπῠρόω</orth>, <sense id="n32352.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strip off the bark</tr_>: metaph., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strip,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
